claim_boundary: Exact-answer and published public-domain differentiable dataset validation evidence only; no hardware execution or isolated benchmark promotion.

cases.claim_boundary: published domain benchmark cases reference committed public QPU data artifacts and validate their Kuramoto conversion path; they are not hardware execution, live provider, or performance benchmark evidence
cases.source_licence: curated small benchmark matrix, no raw participant recording
cases.source_reference: Stam et al., Clinical Neurophysiology 118, 2317 (2007); Breakspear, Nature Neuroscience 20, 340 (2017)
cases.transform: alpha-band PLV matrix normalised to a symmetric Kuramoto K_nm

cases.claim_boundary: published domain benchmark cases reference committed public QPU data artifacts and validate their Kuramoto conversion path; they are not hardware execution, live provider, or performance benchmark evidence
source_formulae: dA_m/dt = gamma_m * A_m + sum_n C_mn * A_n
cases.source_licence: curated small benchmark matrix, no proprietary discharge trace
cases.transform: NTM/RWM mode-coupling weights normalised to a symmetric Kuramoto K_nm

cases.claim_boundary: published domain benchmark cases reference committed public QPU data artifacts and validate their Kuramoto conversion path; they are not hardware execution, live provider, or performance benchmark evidence
source_formulae: P_i = sum_j V_i * V_j * B_ij * sin(delta_i - delta_j)
K_ij = V_i * V_j * B_ij / (2 * H_i * omega_0)
cases.source_reference: IEEE PES public test feeder / Stagg-El-Abiad 5-bus constants
cases.transform: V_i V_j B_ij / (2 H_i omega_0) Kuramoto conversion

kuramoto_cases.analytic_contract: two-oscillator XY phase energy E=-K*cos(theta_1-theta_0), gradient=(-K*sin(delta), K*sin(delta)), and R=|(exp(i theta_0)+exp(i theta_1))/2|
kuramoto_cases.claim_boundary: synthetic exact-answer datasets validate bounded differentiable math and training fixtures; they are not hardware, external measured-system, or isolated performance benchmark evidence

qnn_cases.analytic_contract: single-feature bounded phase response p=0.5*(1-cos(x+theta)) has exact labels and zero MSE gradient at theta=0
